title: Azhagendral Lyrics Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Ranina Reddy, C Sathya
Song: Azhagendral
Music : C. Sathya
Lyrics: Pa Vijay
Movie: Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru		.
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Azhagendral aval thaana ?
azhagukkey azhagaanaa
aval paartha paarvayiley
azhagaaga thozhaindhena!! (2)

Nee yaaradi en chellamey
un punnagai  uyir kollumey
oru nodiyil sarindhena
adi manadhil dhinanaa dhinana ..

azhagendraal avaldhaana
sengarudaa oh sengaruda
Ee thikku mukku thakka dhimi yentira
sundharitho nee sundharitho ne
eekka sarigama padha ne sa paadagaa

Oh netrellaam idhupol illai
indru thaan ingu thollao
kaaranam neethaaney

Nanbanai thalla sonnen
thanimayil pesi sendren
ennamo seidhaai needhaaney

oh sanjana!! oh sanjanaa !!
en nenjalaam thandhanaa
un kannil saaindhenaa
oh ...

Oh thevaigal yedhum illai
thedave ondrum illai
endru naan thembaai irundheyney

Dhevadhai unnai kandaen
thaeyilai kannai kandaen
indru en thavarai unardhenay

oh sanjana!! ye sanjanaa !!
en nenjalaam thandhanaa
un kannil saaindhenaa
oh ...

azhagendraal... avaldhaanaEnglish Translation
I tried my best :)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Azhagendral?

The song Azhagendral expresses deep admiration and affection towards a loved one, highlighting their beauty and the emotions they evoke.

What is the plot context of the movie Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru?

The movie revolves around the comedic and romantic escapades of its characters, with Azhagendral serving as a pivotal moment that showcases the romantic angle.

Who are the artists behind the song?

The song features the talented singers Ranina Reddy and Sathya C, with lyrics penned by Pa Vijay and music composed by Sathya C.

When was Azhagendral released?

Azhagendral was released on May 4, 2013, as part of the movie Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Azhagendral, the protagonists express their love and admiration through heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of romance, making it a perfect fit for wedding celebrations and special occasions. As the characters navigate their feelings, the music enhances the narrative, evoking joy and warmth. This track stands out as a memorable piece in the film, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhagendral from the movie Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and admiration. With the enchanting voices of Ranina Reddy and Sathya C, paired with Sathya C's captivating music, this song creates a beautiful atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Dive into the melodious charm of this track that perfectly complements the film's vibrant narrative.
stanzaMeanings: Is she beautiful? She is so lovely, when I see her, I bow down in admiration!! (2)
Who are you, my dear? Your smile takes my life away in an instant, oh my heart, day after day..
Is she beautiful? Oh, is she beautiful? This face, this nose, is it really so beautiful? You are beautiful, you are the melody of music.
Oh, there is nothing like this today, the reason is you.
I told my friend, I spoke alone, I don't know what you did.
Oh Sanjana!! Oh Sanjana!! Did my heart give you to your eyes? Oh...
Is she beautiful? Is she really beautiful?
Oh, there is nothing to seek, there is nothing at all, I was just waiting.
I saw God in you, I saw my mother in your eyes, today I realize my mistake.
Oh Sanjana!! Oh Sanjana!! Did my heart give you to your eyes? Oh...
Is she beautiful? Is she really beautiful?
